room.caption: [G1-2] At least you can jump on Goombas this time.
room.creationCode:
if global.gameProgress=170 global.gameProgress=180
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2 backFollowFore.backSet=backMarioB backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollowFore.yMoveScale=1 backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2MainA) sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh2SideA)
SS_FreeSound(global.msc_MarioClear); global.msc_MarioClear=0 var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(104) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: bShowArrow=false exitType=2 newMapX=64 newMapY=256 toRoom=rMario1_3 y+=24
